title: Tankster's Discs
description:
This mod adds 50 new music discs to play,
The music discs are obtained by 6 new ores,
The Discs are for you to discover.
body:
This mod adds 50 new music discs to play!

The music discs are obtained by 6 new ores 

Ore 1: Space (End) \
Ore 2: Goblin (Overworld and Nether) \
Ore 3: Cyber (Deepslate Overworld and End) \
Ore 4: Crystal (Stone Overworld and Amethyst Geodes) \
Ore 5: Dark (Deepslate Overworld and Deep Dark) \
Ore 6: Limbo (Deep Overworld, Deep Dark, End, and Nether)

Music Discs are for you to discover (also the ores can give random other vanilla items)
